Infectum.turoyo: šawʕo=niše ko-layši, w šawʕo ko-ǧəġri at=tanure, w šawʕo ko-duqi 454; 73/258-259; zəbṭina-lan bayto bas-yo fayšina b-u=tanur-awo k-oṯən an=noše hul d-ko-duqi kmo dawqe d-laḥmo haka nafəl gazguzo mede mḥalqi-li-yo xd-u=kalbo d-oxan-ne haw ko-maqbanno ono u=med-ano g-əzzi d-zobaṭn-i bayto
translations:
sieben
			Weiber kneten Teig, sieben heizen die Backöfen, sieben kleben die
			Brotfladen an

‘We
			shall rent ourselves a house. We shall no longer stay in that
			bakehouse (lit. ‘stove’). People come (there) to bake a couple
			of flatbreads. And if a piece (of a flatbread) falls down, they
			throw it to me like like I am some dog and should eat it. I shall
			no longer accept this! I shall go and get myself a house!’
			77/196-197;
